name: conformance: the cloud-architect output conforms - every decision is cited and grounded
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/fullstack-international-aws-profile.json" --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const ALL=Object.values(j.pillars).flat();const groups=Object.keys(j.pillars).filter(p=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).length>0);const srcs=new Set(ALL.map(c=>c.source_id));process.exit(j.needs_grounding.length===0 && ALL.every(c=>typeof c.source_id==="string"&&c.source_id.length>0&&c.grounding==="grounded")?0:1)' && echo every-decision-cited 1>&2
